query: Find hospital near Patna for C-section

recommendation.name: Patna Medical College and Hospital
recommendation.reason: This is a verified government hospital with a fully equipped maternity ward, active anesthesiologists, and high trust score.

reasoning.text: Found 12 facilities claiming C-section near Patna.
Evaluated trust scores. 5 facilities had trust scores below 0.5.
Selected the nearest high-confidence alternative with a fully equipped surgical setup.

warnings.name: Maa Kripa Clinic
warnings.reason: This facility claims maternity and C-section services, but lists no anesthesiologists or surgical equipment (Rule: SURGERY_WITHOUT_ANESTHESIA).
